chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Pett: No.D- 722 of 20'16. Date Order with srgnature of Hon'ble Judge / For orders on Maintainabilitv 23 11.2016 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Akber Kalhoro, State Counsel None is present for the petitioner. Same was position on the last date of hearing. lt appears that after filing this petition the petitioner has lost interest in the matter therefore, same is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE M \ 6.
